articles.title: AI Super-Sleuth Finds 100+ Hidden Planets — Some Are Really Weird!
articles.summary: A smart computer program just discovered over 100 new planets hiding in NASA data. Some orbit their star in less than a day, and others live in a 'desert' where planets shouldn't exist. This changes how we count worlds in the galaxy.

articles.title: Do Animals Feel Joy? Scientists Are Building a 'Joy-o-Meter' to Find Out!
articles.summary: Scientists have mostly studied animal fear and pain, but now they're chasing happiness. A team is creating a 'joy-o-meter' to measure brief, intense joy in apes, dolphins, and parrots. Early results show chimps giggle and bonobos love basketballs.

articles.title: May Sky Show: Shooting Stars, a Moon-Venus Meetup, and a Rare Blue Moon!
articles.summary: May 2026 is packed with sky wonders. The Eta Aquarid meteor shower peaks around May 5–6 with fast, bright shooting stars from Halley's Comet. On May 18, the crescent Moon snuggles up to brilliant Venus. The month ends with a Blue Moon on May 31.
